name: Colors
description: Two-tier colour system. Tier 1 (palette) holds raw hex values — never reference these in components. Tier 2 (semantic tokens) provides role-based names that components use.

palette.note: Internal only. Exported only to tokens.json for reference. Do not import palette in components.

semantic.note: Import from src/lib/tokens.ts as: import { colors } from '@/lib/tokens'

darkMode.strategy: swap semantic token values — the token names stay the same
darkMode.mappings: documented as inline comments in tokens.ts and as $description fields in tokens.json
